title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## Iwi affiliation: 2023 Census
Iwi affiliation: 2023 Census launches 20 new Aotearoa Data Explorer (ADE) tables that provide data on people who affiliate with one or more iwi.

## Working lives are getting longer
New Zealanders are joining the workforce earlier and continuing to work later in life.

## New Zealanders on the move
The New Zealand population is highly mobile, with 2.2 million people moving address within New Zealand between 2018 and 2023.

## Work, education, transport, and population structure: 2023 Census
Work, education, transport, and population structure: 2023 Census provides information about the final release of Aotearoa Data Explorer tables from the 2023 Census as well as two supporting news stories and geospatial files.

## Disability and activity limitations: 2023 Census
Provides information through the release of 52 new Aotearoa Data Explorer tables and a report Using data from the Household Disability Survey and the 2023 Census.

## Rainbow/LGBTIQ+ population: 2023 Census
Provides data on LGBTIQ+ communities with the release of 24 new Aotearoa Data Explorer tables.

## Families, households, and housing: 2023 Census
This 2023 Census release on families, households, and housing includes 53 new Aotearoa Data Explorer tables and a news story Families and households in the 2023 Census – further insights into how we live.

## Families and households in the 2023 Census – further insights into how we live
Today’s release of 2023 Census data includes more detailed information about families and households, and the people within them.

## Ethnicity, culture, and identity: 2023 Census
Ethnicity, culture, and identity: 2023 Census provides 18 new Aotearoa Data Explorer tables relating to ethnicity, birthplace, languages spoken, and religious affiliation. These are combined with age, gender, occupation, and total personal income, and grouped by geographic area and census year.

## New Zealand index of socioeconomic deprivation: 2023 Census
New Zealand index of socioeconomic deprivation: 2023 Census provides 18 new Aotearoa Data Explorer tables on the 2023 New Zealand index of socioeconomic deprivation (NZDep2023).

## Detailed regional infographics from 2023 Census
Infographics showing detailed regional statistics from 2023 Census data.

## Māori descent population: 2023 Census
Māori descent population: 2023 Census provides information and data on Māori descent population concepts through a number of different products, such as Aotearoa Data Explorer tables, an infographic, and a methods paper, Māori and iwi population concepts in the 2023 Census.
